document_kind_reasons: declares the standard under review and answers 15 criteria
outdated_note: The vendor report date (April 2025) is approximately 15 months old. VPATs older than 12 months may not reflect the current accessibility state of the product. SFBRN recommends requesting an updated VPAT before final procurement decisions.

score_detail.message: Moderate accessibility support. The submitted VPAT indicates general WCAG Level AA support, but some barriers or exceptions may require review before approval.
